column65: Creates the first numerical analysis-adjacent scalar summary from the ignored local G3SX30 embedding artifact. This is a pipeline integration result only: it is not a biological comparison, interface result, binding result, or longevity evidence. The next concrete step must add a controlled comparator or pairwise embedding summary without an intervening scalar-summary approval/review/scaffold layer.
